sources_used: expertise.com city directories (Houston, Dallas, Fort Worth, San Antonio, Austin, Plano, Frisco, Sugar Land, Pearland, The Woodlands, Round Rock, Cypress)
BBB profiles, Yelp listings, LinkedIn for ownership and founding-year confirmation

exclusion_log.name: DuraServ LLC (Coppell, TX)
exclusion_log.reason: Acquired June 2024 by Leonard Green & Partners (PE). Largest commercial OH door consolidator in US. PE-backed — excluded per acquisition criteria.

exclusion_log.name: Cedar Park Overhead Doors (Cedar Park, TX)
exclusion_log.reason: Acquired June 2024 by Gridiron Capital's GarageCo Holdings platform. PE-backed — excluded.

exclusion_log.name: Overhead Door Company of Houston
exclusion_log.reason: Owned by DH Pace Company (Olathe, KS) — large multi-state consolidator. Excluded from independent target list.

exclusion_log.name: Aaron Overhead Doors (Houston)
exclusion_log.reason: On exclude-list per skill brief — AmeriPro / Aaron Overhead Door brand.

exclusion_log.name: A1 Garage Service / A1 Garage Service Plus locations
365 Overhead Garage Door / 365 Garage Door Repair
exclusion_log.reason: Multi-state operator (TX, GA, FL, others); flagged as potential rollup — excluded for cautious independence.

exclusion_log.name: Pros On Call (Austin)
exclusion_log.reason: Pros On Call is a national multi-trade brand operating in many states (locksmith + garage door franchise-like) — excluded.

caveats: Truck counts are ESTIMATES based on reported team size, BBB / LinkedIn employee counts, and 'service trucks' references on websites. Not direct fleet counts.
Service mix labels (residential / commercial / mixed) derived from website language; verify before high-conviction outreach.
Independence verified at website-footer + ownership search level. Recommend secondary TX SOS registered-agent check before final outreach.
O'Brien Garage Doors (Austin) flagged: family-owned but multi-state (15+ metros). Treat as 'larger independent regional,' not solo-owner.
Hutchins Garage Doors (Austin) historically a 'sister company' to Cedar Park Overhead Doors per their About page (status post-Gridiron acquisition unclear — flagged for re-verification).
Texas Overhead Door (txohd.com — Burleson/Cleburne) NOT same as Plano Overhead Garage Door — different entities.

Action Garage Door Repair Specialists (Plano) — IDA Top 100 #86, family-owned since 1984, multi-market within TX (DFW, Houston, Austin, Sherman). Larger than typical solo-owner but stays family-owned per public statements.
Killeen Overhead Doors — IDA Top 100 #95, founded 1991 by Jim & Rochelle Luster, multi-generation (sons Dennis and Brett). Verified independent.
Phone numbers verified where present in source; many directory pages omit phones — left null rather than fabricate.

independence_notes: Founded 1947 by Harry & Merle Crosland. Bought by Doyle Benton (longtime installer) in 1979. Now 3-generation family business — son-in-law Randy Oliver has run it since ~1981. IDEA-accredited dealer. No PE / franchise affiliation. STRONG INCLUDE — long tenure, multi-generation, IDA Top 100.
Family-owned and operated since 1977 — started in owner's home. 'All employees full-time & in-house.' No franchise or PE affiliation. STRONG INCLUDE — IDA Top 100, 48-year tenure, family operation.

legal_name: Action Garage Door Repair Specialists, Inc.
independence_notes: Family-owned since 1984 — same location 40 years, 400K+ customers. Operates DFW, Houston, Austin, Sherman-Denison. Larger regional independent — flagged as 'family-owned multi-market,' not solo-owner. NO PE / franchise affiliation evident.

Founded 1991 by Jim & Rochelle Luster (24-year Army veteran). 2nd-gen with sons Dennis and Brett. IDA Top 100 #95. Named Top 100 dealer by 1997. STRONG INCLUDE — multi-generational, Central TX market (off main metros).
IDA Member, BBB A+, Clopay / LiftMaster Master Dealer. Locally operated, no franchise / parent. Second location in Pflugerville (Austin area). Founded year not on site — needs SOS check.

legal_name: Alamo Door Systems of Texas, Inc.
independence_notes: 50 years operating San Antonio. 'Local Company, National Reputation.' IDA scholarship donor. No franchise or PE language. STRONG INCLUDE — long-tenure independent.
Family-owned 50+ years (since 1971). Serves Houston + Austin. No subcontractors policy. STRONG INCLUDE — long tenure family business.
Founded by Travis Sweitzer in 2006, 6 employees + 4+ technicians. Second location in Channelview. Sole proprietor / family-run. INCLUDE — solo-owner archetype, 20-year tenure approaching.
Family-run since 1987. 'Staff are either employees or family.' 10K+ 5-star reviews. STRONG INCLUDE — long-tenure family residential service.
Founded 1989 by John Henderson. 6 service trucks, 6-acre property with warehouse. 30+ yrs industry experience. STRONG INCLUDE — long-tenure family business, Houston east-side.

Family-owned since 1986. Two locations: Burleson + Cleburne. Houston / Woodlands location at 'The Woodlands, TX 77354.' Multi-market within TX/LA/OK commercial. STRONG INCLUDE — large family-owned regional.
Founded 2003 by Brandon Bailey (DFW). Faith-based, family-run. Multiple DFW locations. INCLUDE — 22-yr tenure, owner-operator.
Locally family-owned San Antonio shop since 1997. NOT a franchise — distinct from 'Aaron Overhead Doors' (Houston excluded). 28-year tenure. STRONG INCLUDE.
Owner: Moses Mizrahi. ~20 years in business San Antonio. Family-owned, locally operated, 1000+ 5-star local reviews. INCLUDE — solo-owner archetype.

legal_name: Helotes Overhead Garage Doors and Contracting, LLC
independence_notes: Multi-generational family-owned since 1985. Founded by Tracy Dever; son Nathan Dever now runs it. 40-year tenure. STRONG INCLUDE — owner transition already underway.
Family-owned Houston, founded ~2015–2018 (slight discrepancy across sources). 25+ years combined tech experience. INCLUDE but borderline on tenure (under 15 yrs).

Owner Iris Espinoza, established 2007. Local manufacturing of custom garage doors (cedar / wood / glass / steel). Custom-builder homes in The Woodlands, River Oaks, Memorial. STRONG INCLUDE — specialty / high-margin.

Founded 1997 by 'Hutch.' Grenier family (Don & Dan) bought 2011. CAUTION: site references 'sister company Cedar Park Overhead Doors' — Cedar Park was acquired by GarageCo (Gridiron Capital) in June 2024. Independence post-2024 needs re-verification via TX SOS — may have been rolled into GarageCo platform.
Owner Quinton Hannah — veteran-owned, started doing doors in 1997, business founded 2001. Small veteran crew. STRONG INCLUDE — 24-year tenure, solo-owner.
Locally owned, started Oak Hill, founded 2010. 15-year tenure. INCLUDE — borderline tenure but clear solo-owner independent.
Austin / Round Rock area independent. Long-running per BBB and directory listings. Need TX SOS / founding-year verification. NOT same as Action Garage Door (Plano).
Family-owned Round Rock per directory. Needs SOS / founding-year verification.

legal_name: R&S Overhead Garage Door of Austin

independence_notes: Family-owned by brothers Pedro and Alfonso Tovar since 2001. Serves DFW + Fort Worth. Note: also has Fort Worth presence at 76112. STRONG INCLUDE — 24-year sibling partnership.
Family-owned since 2001 by Mike Porter. Faith-based, custom cedar doors specialty. STRONG INCLUDE — 24-yr tenure.

legal_name: Johnny B's Garage Doors And Service

independence_notes: Arlington family-owned, 25 yrs in service. NOTE: distinct from 'Alamo Door Systems' (San Antonio) — different entities. Verify TX SOS.
Dallas independent. NOTE: similar-name to Hollywood-Crawford (San Antonio) but DIFFERENT entity. Verify TX SOS.
Locally owned, family-run ~20 yrs. Dallas + Plano locations.
Family-owned 30+ years Richardson. STRONG INCLUDE — long tenure.
Family business since 1983 — 42 years. STRONG INCLUDE.
Family-owned since 2000. Serves DFW + Houston. STRONG INCLUDE — 25-year tenure.
Allen / North DFW independent, since 1999. 26-year tenure.
Prosper / North DFW family business (Blake + sons — family-name = strong independence signal).

address: 2201 E President George Bush Hwy Ste 108

independence_notes: Houston, 46-yr service history per Best Pick Reports. CAUTION: a 'ProLift Garage Doors of Houston' brand exists as a franchise of ProLift Doors (multi-market). Verify TX SOS — may be franchise. Flagged.
Houston family-owned per Best Pick Reports.
Stafford / Fort Bend, commercial / access-control focus. Locally operated.
Brazoria / South Houston suburb, since 2001. 24-yr tenure.
Family-owned by Justin and Robin Hodges. The Woodlands / Conroe area.
Locally-owned family business, The Woodlands / Spring. 40+ yrs combined exp.

West Houston independent (initials suggest founder family-name).

independence_notes: Operates BOTH Houston AND Austin (10011 Stonelake Blvd) per directory — multi-market. Verify whether single owner or franchise. Flagged.
